시편 91:1.content: He who dwells in the secret place of the Most High will rest in the shadow of the Almighty.

시편 91:2.content: I will say of Yahweh, “He is my refuge and my fortress; my God, in whom I trust.”

시편 91:3.content: For he will deliver you from the snare of the fowler, and from the deadly pestilence.

시편 91:4.content: He will cover you with his feathers. Under his wings you will take refuge. His faithfulness is your shield and rampart.

시편 91:5.content: You shall not be afraid of the terror by night, nor of the arrow that flies by day,

시편 91:6.content: nor of the pestilence that walks in darkness, nor of the destruction that wastes at noonday.

시편 91:7.content: A thousand may fall at your side, and ten thousand at your right hand; but it will not come near you.

시편 91:8.content: You will only look with your eyes, and see the recompense of the wicked.

시편 91:9.content: Because you have made Yahweh your refuge, and the Most High your dwelling place,

시편 91:10.content: no evil shall happen to you, neither shall any plague come near your dwelling.

시편 91:11.content: For he will put his angels in charge of you, to guard you in all your ways.

시편 91:12.content: They will bear you up in their hands, so that you won’t dash your foot against a stone.

시편 91:13.content: You will tread on the lion and cobra. You will trample the young lion and the serpent underfoot.

시편 91:14.content: “Because he has set his love on me, therefore I will deliver him. I will set him on high, because he has known my name.

시편 91:15.content: He will call on me, and I will answer him. I will be with him in trouble. I will deliver him, and honor him.

시편 91:16.content: I will satisfy him with long life, and show him my salvation.”
